domains.label: Attachment and regulation
domains.tracks: Separation, repair, comfort-seeking, recovery time, parent response
domains.guidanceOutput: Co-regulation script, repair script, transition ritual
domains.safetyBoundary: Escalate severe distress, regression, self-harm language, or sustained functional impairment

domains.label: Language and communication
domains.tracks: Expressive language, receptive language, multilingual exposure, school phrases
domains.guidanceOutput: Daily phrase practice, serve-and-return prompts, teacher notes
domains.safetyBoundary: No speech-delay diagnosis; route persistent concern to screening/professional advice

domains.label: Cognition and executive function
domains.tracks: Attention, planning, flexibility, working memory, problem-solving
domains.guidanceOutput: Next best challenge, visual routine, step-down task
domains.safetyBoundary: Avoid labeling the child; distinguish skill gap from willful behavior

domains.label: Social development
domains.tracks: Peer play, turn-taking, empathy, conflict, social confidence
domains.guidanceOutput: Play script, social story, exposure ladder
domains.safetyBoundary: Escalate isolation, bullying, aggression, or sudden social withdrawal

domains.label: Independence and adaptive skills
domains.tracks: Sleep, toileting, dressing, eating, chores, transitions
domains.guidanceOutput: Independence ladder, prepared environment, responsibility step
domains.safetyBoundary: Avoid shame or coercive plans; watch for medical or sensory explanations

domains.label: Sensory and motor patterns
domains.tracks: Sound, texture, movement, fatigue, fine/gross motor observations
domains.guidanceOutput: Sensory-aware routine, environment change, observation log
domains.safetyBoundary: Observation only; professional referral for persistent sensory or motor concerns

domains.label: Ecosystem and stressors
domains.tracks: Family routines, school context, languages, moves, illness, conflict, caregiver stress
domains.guidanceOutput: Context-aware plan, co-parent alignment prompt, handoff summary
domains.safetyBoundary: Do not assign blame; route safety, abuse, or crisis concerns to appropriate help

ageBands.label: 0 to 12 months
ageBands.productBehavior: Emphasize serve-and-return, feeding/sleep observation, parent reassurance, pediatric escalation for red flags

ageBands.label: 12 to 36 months
ageBands.productBehavior: Offer simple choices, visual routines, naming feelings, safe limits, milestone monitoring

ageBands.label: 3 to 5 years
ageBands.coreTask: Initiative, play, school readiness, emotional language
ageBands.productBehavior: Generate scripts, social stories, transition rituals, practice games, teacher handoff notes

ageBands.label: 6 to 8 years
ageBands.productBehavior: Build responsibility ladders, problem-solving scripts, school collaboration, confidence tracking

ageBands.label: 9 to 12 years
ageBands.coreTask: Identity seeds, agency, executive function, social complexity
ageBands.productBehavior: Use collaborative planning, family council prompts, habit design, privacy-respecting reflection

sixFrames.label: Aim
sixFrames.description: What human formation or developmental aim this response serves

sixFrames.label: Two Axes
sixFrames.description: How the response balances warmth/attunement with structure/responsibility

sixFrames.label: Story
sixFrames.description: What ritual, narrative, or meaning-making thread the family can carry

sixFrames.label: Shadow
sixFrames.description: What hard emotion, avoidance, fear, anger, or rupture must be faced instead of bypassed

sixFrames.label: Marriage
sixFrames.description: What co-parent/caregiver alignment or repair is needed around the child

sixFrames.label: Shepherd
sixFrames.description: Which adult, professional, or institutional steward should hold the next handoff
